'''Stusjevsky''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] living and working on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] as a sniffer in a [[vine-coffee]] garden. He aided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in finding [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], who had been kidnapped by [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]].
